Package Description

The CMake API for ament_xmllint to check XML file using xmmlint.

Maintainers

  • Michael Jeronimo
  • Michel Hidalgo

Authors

  • Audrow Nash
  • Claire Wang
  • Dirk Thomas

Package Description

The CMake API for ament_xmllint to check XML file using xmmlint.

Authors

  • Dirk Thomas
  • Claire Wang

Version 0.12.15

Build type AMENT_CMAKE
Use RECOMMENDED

Package Description

The CMake API for ament_xmllint to check XML file using xmmlint.

Maintainers

  • Michael Jeronimo
  • Michel Hidalgo

Authors

  • Audrow Nash
  • Claire Wang
  • Dirk Thomas
